Snow White and the Huntsman (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $155,136,755Details
International Box Office $245,884,991
Worldwide Box Office $401,021,746
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $33,000,396
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $18,748,893
Total $51,749,289
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Snow White is the only woman in the land fairer than the evil Queen Ravenna who is out to destroy her. But what the wicked ruler never imagined was that the young woman who has escaped her clutches and now threatens her reign has been training in the art of war with a Huntsman named Eric who was dispatched to capture her.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$56,217,700 (36.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.76 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$170,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,773 opening theaters/3,777 max. theaters, 5.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $233,094,922

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 1st, 2012 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: May 30th, 2012 (Wide) (Egypt)
May 30th, 2012 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
May 31st, 2012 (Wide) (Argentina)
May 31st, 2012 (Wide) (Thailand)
May 31st, 2012 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: September 11th, 2012 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, and brief sensuality.
(Rating bulletin 2219, 4/18/2012)
Running Time: 127 minutes
Franchise: Snow White and the Huntsman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Motion Capture Performance, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Fairies, Faked Death, Good vs. Evil, Mariticide / Uxoricide, Non-Chronological, Prince/Princess, Royalty, Step-Family, War, Widow/Widower, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Rebellion, Sword & Sorcerer
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Roth Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Snow White is the only woman in the land fairer than the evil Queen Ravenna who is out to destroy her. But what the wicked ruler never imagined was that the young woman who has escaped her clutches and now threatens her reign has been training in the art of war with a Huntsman named Eric who was dispatched to capture her.
